summary: Iteration 15 — Validated homeowner calculator-first flow (POST /api/calculate/quick-potential), narrative hero on /buildings/{id}/potential, subsidies match shape, two admin seed endpoints (CMS persona teasers + subsidies), plus front-end pages (/calculate, /admin, /admin/discover, /subsidies, Navbar). 9/9 backend pytest pass and full Playwright happy-path works end-to-end. Found + fixed 2 backend bugs that were preventing the seed endpoints from working (see backend_issues.fixed).

fixed_during_iteration.issue: subprocess.run(['python', ...]) resolved to /usr/bin/python3.11 which lacks pymongo; both seed scripts crashed with ModuleNotFoundError. Fixed by switching to sys.executable so the same venv used by uvicorn is used.
Both called record_audit(..., details={...}) but record_audit signature only accepts metadata=. Endpoints returned 500. Renamed kwarg to metadata.

action_items: (Optional) The /calculate City and Building Type fields are shadcn Select components (button[role=combobox]), not native selects. Playwright fill() does NOT work on them. Defaults (Mumbai / Independent home) submit fine. If you want testers to be able to fill City/BuildingType in scripts, expose an underlying <input> or add a data-testid on the option items. Functionally correct as-is.
(Optional) Calculator submit with state autodetected from city would be nice — currently state stays null on minimal payload (verified non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: server.py used bare 'python' in subprocess.run — broken in the kube container where /usr/bin/python3.11 has no pymongo. Always use sys.executable for subprocess of a sibling script.
BUG FIXED: seed endpoints called record_audit(details=...) but the helper expects metadata=. TypeError → 500. Two call sites. Suggest adding a unit test for record_audit kwargs to lock the contract.

Narrative builder (server.py:2696-2767) is clean and defensive — gracefully handles zero co2/savings and produces a sensible fallback headline ('Here's what X can do…'). Cars-equivalent (4.6 t/car) and households-water (135 L × 4 ppl × 365 d) are reasonable indian averages — keep them in a constants module for traceability.

QuickCalcRequest has a confusing default for `families`: `families = payload.families or max(1, int((payload.family_size or 4) and 1))` — the inner expression is always 1, so `family_size` is effectively ignored for `families_estimated`. Either remove the dead expression or actually map family_size to families when building_type is multi-family. Currently only `apartment/housing_society/residential_complex` paths honour `payload.families`.
server.py is now 3849 lines — strongly recommend extracting admin/seed/calculator routes into routers/ modules (file-size guideline >700 lines).
Subsidies hero on /subsidies renders dark band with text-slate-50; contrast confirmed visually. KPI band on Potential page now bg-slate-900/80 with text-emerald-50 — readable.
Sticky Discover & Import button confirmed: ancestor div has position:sticky bottom-3; remains visible after scroll (bounding box y=936 in 1080-tall viewport).
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (sys import + 2 subprocess fixes + 2 record_audit kwarg fixes)
/app/memory/test_credentials.md (no change; minted new dev token iter15_test_session in db.user_sessions, valid 24h)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (calc→potential, admin seed UI, sticky discover, subsidies hero all verified)

test_credentials: Admin: gp@sus10.ai via Bearer iter15_test_session (db.user_sessions doc with session_token field, NOT 'token' field). Previous iter10_fe_session was indeed expired.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/admin/cms/seed-persona-teasers and /api/admin/subsidies/seed both ran successfully — 4 persona slugs present in cms_pages and 15 active subsidies in db.subsidies. Test buildings (TEST_ITER15* address prefix) and waitlist entries (test_iter15_* email prefix) cleaned up at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: IMPORTANT for auth: db.user_sessions uses field name 'session_token' (not 'token'). When minting a dev session, the doc must have keys: session_token, user_id, expires_at (ISO string). Use cookie name 'session_token' on the preview domain. /calculate's City and Building Type fields are shadcn Selects — Playwright fill() won't work on them; either click to open the listbox and click an option, or rely on defaults (Mumbai / Independent home). Narrative hero testid is 'narrative-hero' and headline child has testid 'narrative-headline'.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_1: subprocess.run(['python', ...]) used bare 'python' which the container resolves to /usr/bin/python3.11 (system interpreter) — that interpreter does not have pymongo installed. Backend's uvicorn process runs from /root/.venv/bin/python which DOES have pymongo. Fix: use sys.executable to inherit the venv.
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_2: After the subprocess succeeded, the handler called record_audit(user=..., action=..., resource_type=..., resource_id=..., details={...}) — but record_audit's signature has kwarg `metadata`, not `details`. TypeError. Fix: rename to metadata=.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Both fixes applied in /app/backend/server.py. 9/9 pytest now green. Recommend adding a CI check that imports sys.executable and a record_audit signature test.
